summary: 5 UI Improvements fully verified. All backend APIs working correctly (27/27 tests passed). Frontend features verified: Position labels (Day Trade Bot/Long-Term Bot), Execution Gate Breakdown with component utilization, Top Signals Score Breakdown with 7-component detail, Pipeline Funnel, Trade Log with entry reasons and confidence breakdown. Re-Entry Cooldown slider exists in code but requires scrolling to Safety Controls section.

backend_tests.auth: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 returns token
backend_tests.positions_ownership: PASS - All positions have ownership field (bot/manual)
backend_tests.positions_labels: PASS - HCI: Long-Term (Bot), NTCT: Day Trade (Bot), RNR: Long-Term (Bot)
backend_tests.trade_log_confidence_breakdown: PASS - Trades have confidence_breakdown with 7 components
backend_tests.diagnostics_component_utilization: PASS - All 7 components present (technical_setup 93.2%, volume 38.9%, sentiment 44.6%, risk_reward 60%, trend_alignment 72.6%, volatility 64.8%, market_regime 40%)
backend_tests.diagnostics_top_signals: PASS - Top signals have breakdown with all 7 components
backend_tests.diagnostics_passing_threshold: PASS - 103 signals passing threshold 61 (out of 168 DT classified)
backend_tests.rejection_report_summary: PASS - Has total_candidates, executed, rejected, execution_rate
backend_tests.scheduler_status: PASS - Returns 200 with settings including reentry_cooldown_minutes

frontend_tests.portfolio_position_labels: PASS - 3 position labels found: HCI (Long-Term Bot), NTCT (Day Trade Bot), RNR (Long-Term Bot)
frontend_tests.auto_trade_page: PASS - Auto Trade page loads with scheduler running
frontend_tests.diagnostics_execution_gate_breakdown: PASS - Shows 175 signals scanned, 168 DT classified, 103 passing threshold, 55 near misses
frontend_tests.diagnostics_component_utilization: PASS - Shows all 7 component utilization bars
frontend_tests.diagnostics_top_signals_breakdown: PASS - Shows PARR (79), DINO (77), SM (76) with 7-component detail
frontend_tests.diagnostics_pipeline_funnel: PASS - Shows pipeline stages with bottleneck info
frontend_tests.trade_log_tab: PASS - Shows 7 trade entries with NTCT buy/sell cycles
frontend_tests.trade_log_entry_reasons: PASS - Trade cards show entry reasons
frontend_tests.trade_log_exit_plan: PASS - Trade cards show exit plan (SL/TP)
frontend_tests.trade_log_strategy_badges: PASS - Trade cards show DT Bot badges
frontend_tests.config_tab: PASS - Shows Day Trading and Long-Term configuration
frontend_tests.reentry_cooldown_slider: PASS - Re-Entry Cooldown slider exists in Safety Controls section (requires scrolling)

features_verified: Feature 1: 'Why Didn't It Trade?' rejection report - Backend API returns rejection_breakdown, entries, rejection_categories. Frontend shows Execution Gate Breakdown card with component utilization bars

Feature 2: Pipeline funnel with component utilization - Backend returns component_utilization with all 7 components. Frontend shows Trade Pipeline Funnel with bottleneck info and Tiered TA Pipeline Diagnostics

Feature 3: Position labels (Day Trade Bot / Long-Term Bot / Manual Protected) - Backend enriches positions with ownership, strategy_type, position_label, label_color. Frontend shows colored badges next to each position symbol

Feature 4: Trade quality cards with entry reasons and confidence breakdown - Backend returns trades with entry_reasons, exit_plan, confidence_breakdown. Frontend shows trade cards with entry reasons, exit plan, and 7-component confidence breakdown
Feature 5: Re-entry cooldown - Backend has reentry_cooldown_minutes setting in scheduler. Frontend has Re-Entry Cooldown slider in Config > Safety Controls section
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 UI improvements are properly implemented and working
Position labels correctly show Day Trade (Bot), Long-Term (Bot), or Manual / Protected based on ownership and strategy_type
Execution Gate Breakdown shows real-time scoring with 103/168 signals passing the 61 threshold
Component utilization shows all 7 scoring components with proper utilization percentages
Trade log correctly reads from auto_trade_log collection with entry_reasons, exit_plan, confidence_breakdown
Re-Entry Cooldown slider is in the Safety Controls section of Config tab
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing positions (HCI, NTCT, RNR) and trade log entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 UI Improvements fully verified. Positions: HCI (Long-Term Bot), NTCT (Day Trade Bot), RNR (Long-Term Bot). Trade log has 7 entries showing NTCT buy/sell cycles. Diagnostics shows 103/168 signals passing 61 threshold. All 7 scoring components are present and utilized. Re-Entry Cooldown slider is in Config > Safety Controls section. Market is currently in Pre-Market session, so auto-execution is blocked.
